subcodes.first_line: The missive of your esteemed self hath reached the Court of the Divine Throne, and whatsoever thou didst set forth in Arabic and Persian hath been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب بمقر عرش وارد شد و آنچه از عربی و فارسی معروض داشتید اصغا گشت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @call to action
